excerpt: In the first quarter of 2024, total production decreased 1.7% year-over-year as the Company managed through model line transitions and demand softness.
Production volumes through the first half of 2024 are tracking below initial annual outlook commentary; the Company has not reaffirmed the 50% growth target.
Full year 2024 production grew approximately 4% vs. 2023, below the growth outlook discussed earlier in the year.
